hero.title: Simple Progressive Fees
hero.tagline: No subscriptions. No hidden costs. Pay only when you get paid.
hero.subtagline: Fees apply per bracket — like income tax. The more you process, the less you pay.

compare.text: Compare: Stripe charges $1,740 on $60k (2.9%). You save $540.

plans.heading: Free vs Pro
plans.subheading: Same fee rates for everyone. PRO unlocks premium features.
plans.freeDesc: Everything you need to start accepting stablecoin payments.
plans.proDesc: Full suite of tools for growing businesses.
plans.proAuto: Pay in crypto. Auto-unlocks free at $5k/mo volume.

chains.heading: 7 Blockchains. 3 Stablecoins. One Integration.
chains.tokens: USDC · USDT · EURC on every chain

enterprise.heading: Enterprise
enterprise.tagline: $250k+/month? Custom rates, dedicated support, SLA guarantees.

q1.a: Like income tax — each bracket applies only to volume in that range. Your first $10k always pays 1%, regardless of total volume. Only amounts above each threshold get the lower rate.

q2.q: When do I get PRO features for free?
q2.a: When your 30-day rolling volume reaches $5,000, PRO features unlock automatically — no payment needed. Or pay $19/mo in crypto to unlock immediately.

q3.a: Fees accumulate monthly. You pay them in stablecoins (USDC/USDT) from your dashboard. You receive 100% of every payment upfront — fees are invoiced separately.

q4.q: What chains and tokens do you support?
q4.a: Solana, Ethereum, TRON, BNB Chain, Base, Polygon, and Arbitrum. USDC, USDT, and EURC on all chains where available.

footerCta.heading: Ready to accept stablecoins?
footerCta.subheading: Set up in 5 minutes. No credit card required.
